x_emilia_program_integrity.flow: Medi-Cal hospice authorization and claim-payment integrity
x_emilia_program_integrity.standards_and_endorsement: Not a DHCS, CMS, Medi-Cal, or regulatory standard or endorsement.

privacy.member_identifier: Pairwise pseudonymous member_ref only; never a name, date of birth, SSN, CIN, BIC, or raw Medi-Cal identifier.
privacy.source_records: Authorization forms, clinical records, and payment instructions remain in the deploying organization's controlled systems. The action carries only commitments and minimum routing metadata.
privacy.deployment_warning: Pseudonymous references and service dates can remain regulated data in a live deployment. This profile does not determine HIPAA, CMIA, or other legal status.

actions.label: Authorize and commit a Medi-Cal hospice claim payment
actions.why: The payment consequence must be bound to the exact provider, member reference, service period, authorization evidence, amount, destination, reviewer authority, and policy the relying party accepted.

field_contract.caid: Canonical Action Identifier for the exact action under the pinned profile and canonicalization rules.
field_contract.provider_npi: Ten-digit National Provider Identifier represented as a string and resolved against deployment-pinned provider standing evidence.
field_contract.member_ref: Relying-party-scoped pairwise pseudonymous reference; not a raw beneficiary identifier and not reusable across relying parties.
field_contract.service_period_end: Inclusive service-period end as YYYY-MM-DD; must not precede service_period_start.
field_contract.authorization_form_digest: sha256 commitment to the exact authorization-form artifact retained by the relying party.
field_contract.amount: Canonical non-negative decimal string for the claim-payment amount; no binary floating point.
field_contract.currency: Exactly USD for this reference profile.
field_contract.payment_destination_digest: Domain-separated keyed SHA-256 commitment to the destination resolved from the system of record; no account or routing number.
field_contract.reviewer_id: Directory-anchored identifier of the named reviewer who performed the Class-A ceremony.
field_contract.authority_proof_digest: sha256 commitment to the accepted EP-AUTHORITY-PROOF-v1 bound to reviewer_id, organization, scope, amount, policy, validity, and revocation state.
field_contract.policy_version: Positive integer version of the policy evaluated for this action.
field_contract.policy_hash: sha256 digest of the exact policy body accepted by the relying party.

capability_and_consumption.expires_no_later_than: The earliest of the receipt expiry, authority expiry, policy expiry, or five minutes after the Class-A decision.
capability_and_consumption.reservation_rule: Reserve the exact amount for this CAID before invoking the payment executor.
capability_and_consumption.consumption_rule: Commit the reservation once after the executor is invoked. A consumed or indeterminate operation is never automatically refunded or replayed.

outcome_and_reconciliation.timeout_or_lost_response: Record the capability operation as committed with outcome indeterminate.
outcome_and_reconciliation.reconciliation_authentication: Verify provider or payment-executor evidence under a relying-party-pinned key and require the same operation_id, CAID/action digest, amount, currency, destination commitment, and provider transaction reference commitment.
outcome_and_reconciliation.reconciliation_record: Append a digest-bound reconciliation record. Never rewrite the original consumed indeterminate operation.

failure_semantics.executor_timeout_or_lost_response: commit indeterminate; refuse blind replay; require authenticated reconciliation
failure_semantics.unavailable_state_or_verifier_dependency: refuse or remain indeterminate; never infer success
